visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a middle-aged male main character, wearing glasses, a patterned newsboy cap, and a white t-shirt, speaking directly into the camera. He is centered against a flat purple studio background with bright, even lighting. Text graphics 'iPASS MONEY' and '防詐提醒!' appear prominently below him. (2) A quick cut shows a close-up of two hands holding two pink-cased smartphones in front of a shelf filled with various smartphone boxes. The scene is bright and commercial, likely a retail setting. (3) The scene returns to the male character in the studio. As he speaks, various graphic overlays appear: an arrow between 'LINE Pay' and 'iPASS MONEY' icons, a cartoon hacker figure in a black mask, an email envelope icon, and animated gold coins. Later, icons of a bank with a red 'X' and a shield appear to emphasize security. The character uses frequent hand gestures to punctuate his points. The video concludes with a full-screen graphic displaying a customer service phone number and a URL against the purple background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko米可手機館. [Slogan]: 手機破盤價，米可超很大!. [Slogan]: iPASS MONEY. [Variety]: 防詐提醒!. (2) [Slogan]: vivo Y38 5G. [Slogan]: miko. [Slogan]: vivo V30 5G. [Slogan]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (3) [Subtitle]: 眾所皆知iPASS MONEY. [Subtitle]: 將於 2026年1月1號. [Subtitle]: 從LINE Pay. [Subtitle]: 遷移至一卡通 iPASS MONEY的App. [Subtitle]: 因此就有詐騙集團趁機犯案. [Subtitle]: 有用戶收到一卡通MONEY使用資料更新通知的Email. [Subtitle]: 照著信內連結操作後. [Subtitle]: 慘遭詐騙6萬. [Subtitle]: 帳號還變成的人頭帳戶. [Subtitle]: 被銀行停權!. [Subtitle]: 一卡通公司已經鄭重聲明說. [Subtitle]: 官方絕不會透過email或簡訊. [Subtitle]: 以資料更新 賬戶異常 或者是 系統升級. [Subtitle]: 的一些名義來要求用戶操作或索取驗證碼. [Subtitle]: 有任何疑慮. [Subtitle]: 可以透過畫面上的客服電話或智能客服進行查證. [Subtitle]: 小心啦 各位. [Slogan]: 客服專線 (02)6631-5190. [Slogan]: 智能客服 https://i-pass.co/8826bw.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing black-rimmed glasses, a grey and black patterned flat cap (newsboy style), and a white t-shirt with a small graphic logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a clean, purple studio wall. A brief secondary background shows a mobile phone retail store shelf with numerous smartphone boxes (Samsung, realme, vivo).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice-over delivering a fast-paced narration in Mandarin. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a steady drum machine beat starts immediately. A soft 'pop' SFX is heard as the first title card appears. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' and 'click' sound effect occurs as the scene cuts to the smartphone display, emphasizing the visual change. The music continues without interruption. (3) The male speaker continues with high enthusiasm and clear articulation. A 'ding' sound effect triggers as the hacker icon appears, followed by a series of 'cha-ching' coin sounds corresponding to the visual gold coins. As the warning about bank suspension is mentioned, a slightly deeper 'thud' SFX emphasizes the seriousness. (4) In the final segment, a 'ping' SFX accompanies the appearance of the customer service contact details. The music swells slightly in volume before a clean fade-out as the speaker gives his final warning.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Context -> Warning -> Official Clarification -> Actionable Advice.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a public service announcement to inform iPASS MONEY users about a potential phishing scam during the platform's migration from LINE Pay. It aims to educate viewers on the tactics used by scammers (fake emails/SMS) and provides official contact information for verification to prevent financial loss.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The logo of 'miko' is consistently present, and a segment specifically recommends buying phones there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a high-quality informational short video utilizing common social media editing techniques (captions, fast cuts, SFX) to deliver a clear safety message.
